positions.thesis: Sole ERT for MPS IIIB (Sanfilippo B), BLA filing guided Q4-26. Bottom-up rNPV/DCF below current price; upside case depends on peer-multiple re-rating or BioMarin buyout.
positions.questions: Confirm diagnosed patient count via KOL; confirm exact BioMarin royalty rate; watch confirmatory-trial power given modest effect size.
